title: Restaurant Settings
subscriptionSuccess: 🎉 Subscription activated! Your restaurant is now on the Premium plan.
subscriptionTimeout: Could not confirm payment automatically. If funds were charged, your status will update within a few minutes.
celebrationSubtitle: Your restaurant now has access to all premium features.
paymentFailedBanner: Payment failed or was cancelled. Please try again.
name: Name
slugHint: Used in URLs. Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens only.
logoUploadHint: Drag photo here or click to select
logoReadyToSave: Logo selected and ready to save
logoWillUploadOnSave: New logo will be uploaded only after pressing "Save".
defaultLanguageHint: The language the admin writes content in. Other languages are auto-translated.
enabledLanguagesHint: Content is automatically translated into the selected languages. If none selected — all supported languages are used.
liqpayHint: Enter your LiqPay public and private keys to accept online payments from clients. Keys are stored encrypted.
liqpayConnected: Keys saved. Online payments are active.
liqpayBothRequired: Both public and private keys are required.
liqpaySaveError: Failed to save keys. Please try again.
